subcategory: scroll-morphing card grid with animation phases
use_cases: Landing page hero sections with interactive scroll-driven card animations
Portfolio showcases where elements morph between scatter, line, circle, and strip formations
Product displays that respond to user scroll with 3D card transformations
Interactive presentations with depth-based perspective card flips
Creative agency websites featuring dynamic visual storytelling
ai_summary: A scroll-morphing hero component featuring an animated grid of cards that transform through four distinct phases—scatter, line, circle, and bottom-strip—driven by scroll position. Cards utilize 3D perspective transforms with spring physics animations and feature hover-triggered flip interactions. Built with Framer Motion for smooth, physics-based transitions between formation states.
